message:
✨ Move AI Missions history to icon-based toggle panel (#10522) (#10527)

Restructure the AI Missions sidebar to prioritize the chat interface:

- Add History toggle icon button next to the + button in the header
  (desktop: standalone icon, mobile: inside + dropdown menu)
- Default view shows focused CTA dashboard (Start Custom, Browse, Mission Control)
- History list is accessible via the History toggle with a badge showing mission count
- Back button preserves origin view (dashboard vs history) when returning from chat
- Auto-open history panel when missions need attention (waiting_input/blocked)
- Clear search filter when hiding history to avoid confusing empty states
- Persist history panel preference in localStorage (manual toggles only)
- Add i18n keys for new UI elements (toggleHistory, showHistory, hideHistory, etc.)
- Show 'View N previous missions' hint on dashboard when missions exist

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
